# Base images the e2e stack pulls each run — cached between CI runs so they are
# loaded from a tarball instead of re-pulled (see .github/workflows/e2e.yml).
# The cache key is a hash of this file, so editing the list refreshes the cache.
# One image ref per line; blank lines and # comments are ignored.
#
# Runner image (tests/e2e-tests.dockerfile):
docker:27-cli
python:3.12-slim
# Index image build (server/Dockerfile):
ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.12-bookworm-slim
# Bundle runtime (docker-compose.yml):
gitea/gitea:1.24
caddy:2-alpine
